name: model-haiku-dispatch-fixture
_doc: T061 / SC-006 fixture — demonstrates end-to-end per-step model selection. A classification teammate step uses model: haiku, a heavier synthesis step uses model: sonnet. This is the anchor fixture proving wheel threads the resolved claude-haiku-* id into the Agent() spawn clause.

steps._doc: Classification step — pure pattern-match, no LLM reasoning between calls. haiku is cheap and fast per plan.md + wheel README rule-of-thumb.
Synthesis step — multi-input draft work. sonnet is the balance.
